title: Organizer communications
privacy_description: Only aggregate recipient and delivery totals are shown. Individual contact details never appear here.
compose_description: Choose an exact event audience, delivery channels and the wording to send.
segments_description: Post-event messages use attendance records. Review requests go only to recorded attendees.
validation_description: Enter a message and select at least one audience segment and channel.
preview_failed_description: The exact audience could not be generated. No draft was saved or sent.
created_description: The message remains a draft until you schedule it.
save_failed_description: Try again. No message was sent.
schedule_invalid_description: Enter a valid local date and time, or leave the field blank to send now.
scheduled_description: The exact audience and channel work are now frozen as audit evidence.
schedule_failed_description: The audience or message state may have changed. Refresh and try again.
cancel_invalid_description: Enter an internal reason of up to 500 characters.
cancelled_description: Delivery was stopped before it began.
cancel_failed_description: Delivery may already have started. Refresh to see the latest status.
retry_queued_description: Failed deliveries will be attempted again.
retry_failed_description: The delivery state may have changed. Refresh and try again.
schedule_description: Leave the field blank to send as soon as possible. Confirming freezes the exact audience.
cancel_description: Cancellation is available only before delivery starts.
load_failed_description: Try again. No message was changed.
empty_description: Create a draft and preview its exact audience before scheduling it.
